archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) — Customized for Japanese Washi & Ink Aesthetic
reasoning: The application needs extreme clarity for Kanji recognition. Washy, low-contrast grays make learning difficult. We use stark white backgrounds, dense ink-black text, and signal red (Hanko) accents for high functional visibility and a traditional-yet-modern aesthetic.

surface.description: Pure white for cards and modals

primary.description: Vermilion/Hanko Red for primary CTAs and active states

text_main.description: Dense ink black for primary text and Kanji

text_muted.description: Charcoal for secondary text and overlines

border.description: Sharp, subtle borders to separate content without heavy shadows

kanji.description: Explicitly use Japanese font stack for accurate stroke rendering.

typography.instructions: DO NOT use Inter for headings. Use Inter ONLY for body. Ensure extreme contrast between text sizes to establish visual hierarchy. Avoid gray-on-gray.

mobile_bottom_nav.tailwind: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-16 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-black/10 z-50 flex items-center justify-around pb-safe md:hidden
mobile_bottom_nav.description: CRITICAL FIX: Replaces sidebar on mobile. Provides persistent access to Dictionary, Flashcards, Quiz.

sidebar_desktop.tailwind: hidden md:flex flex-col fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 border-r border-black/10 bg-[#FDFCFB]

main_content_area.tailwind: w-full min-h-screen pb-20 md:pb-0 md:pl-64 pt-6 md:pt-12
main_content_area.description: Accounts for mobile bottom nav and desktop sidebar.

bento_grid.tailwind: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6
bento_grid.description: Use for dictionary lists or dashboard overviews.

lesson_selector.mobile: flex overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap gap-2 pb-4 hide-scrollbar snap-x items-center max-w-full
lesson_selector.pill_base: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-black/10 text-sm font-medium transition-all snap-center select-none cursor-pointer
lesson_selector.description: CRITICAL FIX: Convert the long vertical list on mobile into a horizontally scrollable row of pills to eliminate vertical space waste.

flashcard.container: relative w-full max-w-sm mx-auto aspect-[3/4] max-h-[60vh] perspective-1000
flashcard.card_inner: w-full h-full transition-transform duration-500 transform-style-3d relative
flashcard.card_face: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full backface-hidden bg-white border border-black/10 rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8
flashcard.kanji_text: text-[6rem] sm:text-[8rem] leading-none font-bold text-[#0A0A0A] mb-4
flashcard.description: CRITICAL FIX: Use 'aspect-[3/4]' and 'max-h-[60vh]' to ensure the card never overflows the mobile screen vertically. Content must stay inside.

quiz_button.base: w-full text-left p-4 md:p-6 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-200 flex items-center justify-between group cursor-pointer
quiz_button.description: Big, touch-friendly targets for multiple choice.

primary_button.tailwind: w-full md:w-auto inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-[#E53935] text-white font-bold rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(229,57,53,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(229,57,53,0.23)] hover:bg-[#D32F2F] transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0 text-lg tracking-tight
primary_button.description: Use for 'Start Quiz', 'Next Card', 'Submit Answer'. On mobile, consider fixing this to the bottom of the screen just above the nav if it's the primary action.

input_field.tailwind: w-full bg-white border border-black/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A0A0A] focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder-neutral-400
input_field.description: For typing and sentence quizzes. Large and extremely clear.

motion.flashcard_flip: Use framer-motion: animate={{ rotateY: isFlipped ? 180 : 0 }}. Ensure container has 'perspective: 1000px'.
motion.page_transition: Subtle fade-in and slide-up for content changes: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.list_stagger: When showing lists of Kanji or quiz choices, stagger the entrance by 0.05s.

image_urls.description: Minimalist abstract 3D composition with Japanese washi paper texture, stark white background, a single bold brushstroke of black ink, and a small vermilion red geometric accent. Use as a subtle top-of-page background image with opacity overlay.
A clean, modern workspace desk with an open notebook showing Japanese characters. Use for 'No lessons selected' or 'Quiz finished' empty states.

accessibility.contrast: Text contrast must meet or exceed 4.5:1. Primary text must be solid black (#0A0A0A). Avoid light grays.
accessibility.test_ids: Every actionable button, link, and input MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-quiz-btn').
accessibility.touch_targets: All mobile buttons and list items must be at least 48px tall.

solutions_summary.mobile_lesson_selector: Switched from a vertical block to a horizontal scrolling pill row, freeing up 60% of vertical mobile viewport.
solutions_summary.mobile_bottom_nav: Added a fixed bottom navigation bar on mobile devices (hidden on desktop). Sidebar is hidden on mobile.
solutions_summary.flashcard_cutoff: Restricted flashcard height using max-h-[60vh] and aspect-ratio CSS. Absolute positioning of faces ensures text stays contained.
solutions_summary.quiz_scrolling: Horizontal lesson selector resolves the scrolling issue. Hiding the selector during an active quiz eliminates it entirely.
solutions_summary.washed_out_light_theme: Applied Swiss High-Contrast styling: Stark white background, pure ink black text, and 1px sharp borders instead of murky drop shadows.
solutions_summary.button_placement: Primary actions moved to prominent, predictable locations (bottom of screen on mobile, right-aligned on desktop). Targets increased to 48px minimum.
